audit_items.proof_trace: All dereferences of `ms` in `prstat` are safe because every caller passes `&mst`, a stack-allocated variable (L173, L218, L247). The only real proof gap is the missing NULL check after `malloc` at L234, but `mdb_stat.c` is a standalone admin utility binary (not linked into slapd) and is unreachable via the LDAP network stack, making the claimed external-reachable/LDAP entry point factually incorrect for this file.
